data.title: This Atlassian Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 4 Upgrades For Monday
Tesla Deploys Unsupervised FSD At Giga Texas To Move Cars From Factory To Lot
data.description: Tesla reveals Giga Texas production facility uses unsupervised FSD to transport vehicles to outbound logistics lot.

data.title: Jim Cramer: Cheesecake Factory Stock Is 'Darn Cheap,' Buying This Tech Stock
data.description: Cramer looks at Cheesecake Factory, Occidental Petroleum, Realty Income, Carriage Services and Palantir on "Mad Money Lightning Round."

data.title: US Watchdog To Investigate SEC Overhaul Led By White House, Elon Musk's DOGE: Report
data.description: The U.S. Government Accountability Office (GAO) has reportedly announced its plans to investigate the changes implemented at the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The probe will focus on alterations led by the White House and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency.

data.title: Jim Cramer Warns Nvidia And Apple Shorts May Let Stocks Rally Before Striking Again: 'Only Way They Can Get Out Of This Mess'
data.description: Jim Cramer believes that heavily shorted stocks, Nvidia and Apple, will rally before the short sellers initiate downward pressure on them.
